subcodes.first_line: We have heard the call of those who were drawn by the breezes of Revelation when the horizon of utterance was illumined by the Sun of My remembrance, the Mighty, the Luminous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندآء الذین انجذبوا من نفحات الوحی اذ انار افق البیان بشمس ذکری العزیز المنیر
